---
title: "user_feedback.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\user_feedback.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.15
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 8.67
overall_score: 5.92
---

## Intent
The `user_feedback.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on log_feedback, FeedbackOrchestrator, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via log_feedback, FeedbackOrchestrator, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `log_feedback`
- `FeedbackOrchestrator`
- `execute`
